#  Publish Personal Drawing Markups (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Published markups can be edited or deleted. Any changes to these markups will automatically be visible to anyone with access to the drawing.* 'Standard' users can only edit personal and published markups that they've created.* Published markups can only be deleted by users with 'Admin' level permissions on the Drawings tool unless [granted specific permissions to delete published markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups).


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to markup and publish.
  4. Add drawing markups or tap the drawing markup you want to publish. See [Markup a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios).
  5. Tap **Publish**.  
_Note:_ Changes are automatically saved, so you can exit the drawing when you're done.


## See Also
  * [View Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/view-drawing-markups-ios)
  * [Create or Link Coordination Issues on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-or-link-coordination-issues-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Link a Correspondence Item on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-a-correspondence-item-on-a-drawing-ios)
title: Publish Personal Drawing Markups (iOS)
description: How to publish personal drawing markups on the Procore iOS app.
